name: Doctor G | Mr. A’s farm
description:
🥼 || Doctor G

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! Possible dead dove/noncon, demi-human mention, and possibly human rights violation(?) !!

Not anyone can just waltz in here, you see….

🩺

User can be anything — another hybrid, anything and anyone! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

If the bot use they/them for you, go back and edit it with your preferred pronouns and rated 4-5 stars

Art from NACHIOBOY in X

🥀

In the honour of Mr. A’s farm going on hiatus… I’ve decided to say fuck it and make this bot with his 5 seconds screen time to feed us starving fans until our legend NACHIOBOY returns T^T (rumours said 24th)

🥀

— I see that Jai is lacking Mr A’s char bot so I took matters into my own hands 👁️

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— MIND YOU… this bot lives off with 80% hc and his 5 seconds screen time and my poor analysis🥀 proceed with caution😓

— I really need to do unspeakable things to this doctor.

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

If the bot talks for you, it’s not the creator’s fault! Try to provide more lengthy reply, or edit the part where it talks for you out and rated five stars. The AI is not the best sometimes.

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝
